backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing user profiles, health assessments with scoring/recommendations, and role-based access control (admin/user permissions) using MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: updating useQueries hook to fetch real backend data and connecting QuickStatsCards to display real statistics from backend.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including routing, assessment flow, admin dashboard, components, hooks, and data structures for the ABL Pulse wellness application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color variables for light/dark themes, including shadcn/ui design tokens for background, foreground, primary, secondary, accent, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for ABL Pulse holistic wellness assessment application with meta tags and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app with TanStack Router setup defining all routes (home, assessment sections, results, admin, docs) wrapped in AssessmentProvider for global state management.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying Root Cause Healing philosophy, four core values cards with icons and hover effects, and integrated FounderProfile component.
frontend/src/components/admin/AccessDeni: Full-screen access denied page with bilingual messaging and a button to return home, shown when unauthorized users attempt to access admin areas.
frontend/src/components/admin/Assessment: Filter panel for admin assessment table with search by name, date range pickers, score range inputs, and a clear filters button showing active filter count.
frontend/src/components/admin/QuickStats: Displays four stat cards showing total assessments, average score, alert users, and recent submissions using data from the admin stats API hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/StatCard.t: Reusable card component for displaying a single statistic with title, value, icon, optional subtitle, and variant styling (default/success/warning/danger).
frontend/src/components/admin/TablePagin: Pagination controls for admin tables with page navigation buttons, rows-per-page selector, and display of current range and total items.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserAssess: Admin data table component that displays user assessment results with filtering (search, date range, score range), sorting, pagination, and CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/components/AnalysisCard.tsx: Reusable card component for displaying problems (red background) or suggestions (green background) with bilingual titles and conditional rendering of items or empty state.
frontend/src/components/AssessmentPlaceh: Empty placeholder component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/AssessmentProgre: Progress bar component showing current section (1-4), percentage completion (25% increments), and animated gradient progress indicator.
frontend/src/components/BasicInfoForm.ts: Form component for collecting user's basic information (name, age, gender, profession, physical measurements, contact details, and medical history) with validation and local storage integration before starting the health assessment.
frontend/src/components/CircularScoreGau: SVG-based circular progress gauge component that displays a health score with gradient colors (red/amber/green) based on the score category status.
frontend/src/components/ContactFooter.ts: Footer component with brand information, quick links, social media icons, WhatsApp consultation button, and admin access link.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary class component that catches and displays errors with bilingual messaging and options to retry or reload the page.
frontend/src/components/FounderProfile.t: Profile card component displaying Dr. Suman Lal's image, credentials, and mission statement with decorative styling.
frontend/src/components/GlobalAssessment: Reusable option selector component for assessment questions with five frequency levels (Never to Daily) in both English and Hindi.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Landing page hero section with animated background effects, main heading, and call-to-action buttons for assessment and WhatsApp consultation.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelectio: Empty file for language selection functionality.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggleBu: Empty file for language toggle button functionality.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Full-screen loading component with animated ABL Pulse logo and bilingual loading text.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Main navigation component with desktop/mobile layouts, language toggle, smooth scrolling to sections, and assessment progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/QuestionCard.tsx: Empty file for question card component.
frontend/src/components/QuestionCard40.t: Empty file for specialized question card component.
frontend/src/components/ResultsPage.tsx: Empty file for assessment results display component.
frontend/src/components/ResumeProgressMo: Empty file for modal to resume incomplete assessments.
frontend/src/components/SectionContainer: Empty file for assessment section wrapper component.
frontend/src/components/SectionScoreCard: Displays a health assessment section score card with bilingual labels (English/Hindi), status indicators (alert/needsWork/optimal), and a progress bar showing score out of 40.
frontend/src/components/ServicesGrid.tsx: Renders a grid of four service cards (Health Score Card, Webinars, 1-on-1 Support, Structured Programs) with icons, titles, and descriptions for the landing page.
frontend/src/components/TipCard.tsx: An expandable card component displaying health tips in both English and Hindi with an accordion section explaining why the tip helps; includes a demo instance.
frontend/src/config/constants.ts: Application-wide constants including WhatsApp consultation number, message template, app metadata, and score thresholds for section and total scores.
React context providing assessment state management including responses for 40 questions, current section, language selection, and section completion/access logic with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Empty file, likely placeholder for language context functionality.
frontend/src/data/assessmentOptions.ts: Empty file, likely placeholder for assessment option definitions.
frontend/src/data/assessmentQuestions.ts: Empty file, likely placeholder for assessment question definitions.
Empty file, likely placeholder for 40-question assessment data.
frontend/src/data/questions/en.ts: English language questions for a 12-question assessment covering sleep, hydration, diet, exercise, stress, and mental well-being across 4 sections.
frontend/src/data/questions/hi.ts: Hindi translations of the 12-question assessment covering sleep, hydration, diet, exercise, stress, and mental well-being across 4 sections.
frontend/src/data/sections/section1.ts: Section 1 questions (IDs 1-10) covering sleep and daily routine habits in both English and Hindi.
frontend/src/data/sections/section2.ts: Section 2 questions (IDs 11-20) covering hydration, digestion, and dietary habits in both English and Hindi.
frontend/src/data/sections/section3.ts: Section 3 questions (IDs 21-30) covering physical activity, exercise, and movement habits in both English and Hindi.
frontend/src/data/sections/section4.ts: Section 4 questions (IDs 31-40) covering mental well-being, gratitude, family relationships, and emotional health in both English and Hindi.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAssessmentProgress: Empty file, likely placeholder for assessment progress tracking hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useBasicInfoStorage.t: React hook providing localStorage utilities for saving, retrieving, clearing, and validating user basic information (name, age, gender, profession, weight, height, WhatsApp number).
frontend/src/hooks/useDebounce.ts: Custom React hook that debounces a value by a specified delay using setTimeout and useEffect.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity storage, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/usePagination.ts: Custom hook providing pagination logic with page navigation, page size control, and computed pagination metadata for data arrays.
frontend/src/hooks/usePDFDownload.ts: Custom hook that manages PDF generation state and downloads wellness assessment reports using the pdfGenerator utility.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating assessment data, admin stats, and user permissions from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTableSort.ts: Custom hook providing table sorting state management with column selection, direction toggling, and a generic comparator function.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind configuration, OKLCH color system for brand theming, custom animations (pulse-glow, electric-wave-flow), and font imports for Playfair Display and Montserrat.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page displaying quick stats cards and a data table of user wellness assessments with navigation and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for admin login page implementation.
frontend/src/pages/AssessmentPage.tsx: Assessment page displaying the BasicInfoForm component with logo, navigation back to home, and branded styling.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page composing Navigation, HeroSection, ServicesGrid, AboutSection, and ContactFooter components.
frontend/src/pages/LogicCorrectionDocsPa: Documentation page that provides a bilingual (English/Hindi) template format for submitting logic corrections and feature updates to the development team. Includes structured sections with accordion UI, badges, and examples for clear communication of changes.
frontend/src/pages/RecommendedServicesPa: Displays recommended wellness services (Health Webinars, 1-on-1 Coaching, Functional Readiness Program) based on user assessment scores. Shows user info card with total score and status, and provides action buttons for each service.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Main results page that displays assessment scores with circular gauge, section breakdowns, analysis cards, and action buttons for PDF download and WhatsApp consultation. Validates assessment completion before rendering.
frontend/src/pages/Section1.tsx: Assessment page for Section 1 (Sleep & Hydration) with bilingual questions, progress bar, and navigation. Validates section completion before allowing progression to Section 2.
frontend/src/pages/Section2.tsx: Assessment page for Section 2 (Gut Cleanse & Metabolic) with access guards to ensure Section 1 is completed. Includes bilingual questions, progress tracking, and navigation between sections.
frontend/src/pages/Section3.tsx: Assessment page for Section 3 (Movement & Circulation Flow) with guards ensuring previous sections are completed. Features bilingual questions, progress bar, and navigation controls.
frontend/src/pages/Section4.tsx: Renders the fourth section of the assessment with navigation guards, progress tracking, and a submission flow that shows a loading overlay before navigating to results.
frontend/src/pages/TestModePage.tsx: Displays three test profiles (healthy, moderate, serious) with scores and medical history fetched from the backend actor, showing results in tabs with circular gauges and section cards.
frontend/src/pages/WellnessProfilePage.t: Displays a user's wellness profile with basic info, total ABL score, and section-by-section scores with color-coded status indicators.
frontend/src/types/admin.ts: Defines TypeScript types for admin dashboard data structures including assessment rows, filters, sorting, and pagination state.
frontend/src/types/assessment.ts: Defines core TypeScript types for the assessment including language, basic info form data, questions, and sections.
Empty file intended for admin statistics calculation utilities.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Provides utilities to format assessment data as CSV, escape fields, generate CSV strings, and trigger browser downloads.
frontend/src/utils/patternAnalysis.ts: Implements rule-based pattern analysis to identify low-scoring question groups and map them to specific health problems with Ayurvedic habit suggestions in English and Hindi.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates a plain text wellness report with scores, section breakdowns, problems, and suggestions, then triggers a browser download as a .txt file.
frontend/src/utils/resultsSharingUtils.t: Empty file intended for results sharing utility functions.
frontend/src/utils/scoringUtils.ts: Provides scoring calculation functions for a 40-question assessment divided into 4 sections (10 questions each, max 40 points per section, 160 total), with category classification (alert/needsWork/optimal) and styling utilities for displaying scores.
frontend/src/utils/testDataProcessor.ts: Converts backend SectionScores data into frontend display format by generating realistic question-level responses from section totals, running pattern analysis, and creating section data with status indicators and medical history-based recommendations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and functions to clear sensitive parameters from the URL after extraction.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappIntegration.t: Opens WhatsApp consultation with a pre-filled message containing user name and ABL score, directing to a default consultation number rather than the user's own number.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, brand colors, typography with Playfair Display and Montserrat fonts, custom animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for ABL Pulse showing known issue where admin dashboard doesn't display submitted assessments, with pending feature requests to connect backend database queries for assessment list and statistics display.
